name: Muffaletta-Style Po-Boys
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 2 tablespoons chopped Salad olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Split French rolls and place cut-side up on a baking sheet.
2. Spread half of the mayonnaise mixture onto each roll.
3. Place one slice of ham on the bottom half of each roll.
4. Top with about 1-1/2 tablespoons of chopped salad olives.
5. Add one slice of salami on top of the olives.
6. Place two slices of Mozzarella cheese on the remaining half of each roll.
7. Set rolls under a broiler until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
8. Carefully place the cheese halves over the meat halves.
9. Slice and serve. Yield 4 to 8 servings.
Source: Southern Living 1983 Annual Recipes
